content.text: I need a way to quickly toggle the state of a specific boolean field on any model instance using a REST-style URL.
What happens if the model instance exists, but the specified field doesn't exist yet? Will it crash during execution?

If the attribute does not exist, `setattr()` will successfully create a new dynamic attribute on the Python object. However, since you are saving this to a database record later via Django, that change will likely fail if your model schema doesn't allow arbitrary attributes.
